name: novelty_detector
description: Fires for NEW inputs, silent for repeated. Core mechanism: depressing synapse (w=20, factor=0.5) weakens with each use. RS single-tick threshold at tonic 2.5 is ~7.2 mA (separatrix crossing). First presentation delivers 20*0.5=10 mA (fires), second spike same presentation delivers 20*0.25=5 (silent). After 190 ticks partial recovery, 2nd presentation delivers ~4.9 (silent). After ~1200 ticks, gain recovers to ~0.93, delivers 9.3 (fires = novel again). The facilitating path provides a parallel 'familiarity' signal that grows with repetition. Use case: attention, habituation, exploration drive.
